name: OpenSanctions by OpenRiskPlatform
description: Matches a person name against OpenSanctions and returns normalized entities with scoring metadata.

entrypoints.name: Match Persons
entrypoints.description: Matches a person name against OpenSanctions and returns normalized entities.

inputs.name: search_input
inputs.title: Search Input
inputs.description: Free-text person name to match against OpenSanctions.

inputs.name: dataset
inputs.title: Dataset Scope
inputs.description: OpenSanctions dataset scope, e.g. default, sanctions, peps.

inputs.name: limit
inputs.title: Result Limit
inputs.description: Maximum number of matches requested from OpenSanctions (1-500).

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.title: Score Threshold
inputs.description: Lower score bound for returned matches (0.0-1.0).

settings.name: token
settings.title: OpenSanctions API Token
settings.description: API token used for authenticated requests to OpenSanctions.

metrics.name: result_count
metrics.title: Result Count
metrics.description: Number of normalized entities returned by the entrypoint.

metrics.name: api_total_count
metrics.title: API Total Count
metrics.description: Total number of matches reported by OpenSanctions for the query.

metrics.name: requested_limit
metrics.title: Requested Limit
metrics.description: Requested OpenSanctions limit value for the query.

metrics.name: last_status_code
metrics.title: Last HTTP Status
metrics.description: HTTP status code from the last OpenSanctions API request.
